name: Shared Feedback Persistence
description: Feedback and suggestions now save to a Databricks Delta table and are visible to all users in real time. Entries from both the Index and Help pages appear in a single shared log tagged with their source page.

name: Alignment of Help Cards on the Index page
description: The cards on the index page are now grouped in 3 columns to appear more cohesive and less wasted space and scrolling.

name: Select Table Columns
description: There is a new tab called Select which will show you a simple query statement of all the columns in the corresponding table.

name: Correct Datatypes on Synapse Tables
description: Remove the length field for INT and BIGINT on column descriptions.

name: Synapse DDL Improvemnt
description: Included missing distribution and indexing of table descriptions.

name: ADF Activity Performance
description: Created a new tab inside of the ADF Metadata Report showing the performance of activities including start, end, duration, I/O.
